name: Competition
description: A Hyperion sniper rifle variant tuned toward higher fire rate and a larger magazine, giving it a slightly more Vladof-like rhythm. It still keeps Hyperion's tightening accuracy, so it rewards steady scoped strings and consistent follow-up shots far more than quick snap firing.
notes: It appears in The Pre-Sequel with similar presentation and a related variant named Fast Turnaround. Here, it can drop as a regular world item from suitable loot sources.
